title: GenderPrediction
description: Gender prediction result returned by the Genderize.io API for a single first name.

name.description: The name as processed by the API.

gender.description: Predicted gender. Null when there is insufficient data to make a prediction.

probability.description: Confidence score for the gender prediction, between 0 and 1. Null when gender is null.

count.description: Number of data samples used to make the prediction.
